articles.summary: Cybersecurity researchers have disclosed details of a critical security vulnerability impacting GitHub.com and GitHub Enterprise Server that could allow an authenticated user to obtain remote code execution with a single "git push" command. articles.title: Brazilian LofyGang Resurfaces After Three Years With Minecraft LofyStealer Campaign
articles.summary: A cybercrime group of Brazilian origin has resurfaced after more than three years to orchestrate a campaign that targets Minecraft players with a new stealer called LofyStealer (aka GrabBot). articles.title: Vimeo Confirms User and Customer Data Breach
articles.summary: The ShinyHunters group is threatening to leak stolen files unless Vimeo agrees to pay a ransom. The post Vimeo Confirms User and Customer Data Breach appeared first on SecurityWeek.

articles.title: China-linked hackers led phishing campaigns targeting journalists and activists, researchers say
articles.summary: The aim of the campaigns was to steal credentials and likely enable “follow-on operations in the interest of the Chinese government,” the report said.
